summary.volDesc: Market in long-gamma regime — dealers suppressing volatility. Premium selling favored.
summary.dealerSummary: Dealers net long delta — sell-rally pressure across markets

signals.title: Long Gamma Regime — NIFTY
signals.desc: Net GEX = +1686.5Cr. Dealers LONG gamma: volatility suppression. Expect range-bound price; premium selling favored.

signals.title: Dealers Long Delta — NIFTY
signals.desc: Dealer net delta: +24,049,084 contracts. Dealers will sell into rallies — capping upside. Best to sell CEs near resistance.

signals.title: IV Elevated — NIFTY: 29.2%
signals.desc: ATM IV at 29.2% — options richly priced. Sell premium via iron condors or spreads. Avoid naked option buying.

signals.title: Fresh Call Writing — NIFTY @ ₹23,000
signals.desc: CE OI at ₹23,000 growing +70% today (153,820 OI). Strong resistance wall forming — sell CE spreads above this level.

signals.title: Zero-Gamma Level Close — NIFTY @ ₹23,021
signals.desc: Spot within 0.3% of zero-gamma (23,021). Crossing this level could trigger accelerated moves as dealer hedging flips direction.

signals.title: Dealer Flip Level @ ₹23,025 — NIFTY
signals.desc: Dealer delta flips at ₹23,025 (0.3% away). Crossing this triggers forced directional hedging — potential for sharp acceleration.

signals.title: Fresh Put Writing — NIFTY @ ₹23,000
signals.desc: PE OI at ₹23,000 growing +40% today (184,531 OI). Strong support floor — sell PE spreads below this level.

signals.title: Max Pain Pull — NIFTY: ₹23,200.0 (+1.1%)
signals.desc: Max pain at ₹23,200.0 is 1.1% above spot. Expiry gravity pulls price toward this level. Strongest within 3 days of expiry.
